sourceOfTruthPolicy: source code first, then tests, then test-generated reports under data/reports, then docs only where they match, then git history, then read-only runtime evidence; previous assistant progress summaries treated as untrusted

validationResults.cargoTest: passed: 1015 tests across 251 binaries, 0 failures, 8 ignored (all env-gated live tests)
validationResults.worktree: clean except allowed ?? dist/; main, v0.1.0 tag, and dist/v0.1.0 artifacts verified unchanged

categories.name: Core app shell / UI / navigation

categories.name: Config discovery / source-aware model

categories.name: 341-row read/write model
categories.evidence: 341 SafeWritableRow entries in src/write_classification.rs verified by pinned tests this run; value kinds, finite choices, and bounds modeled
categories.remaining: none for the v0.55.2 model

categories.name: Safe normal-scalar config writes
categories.evidence: apply_setting_change with backup/write/reread verification; 27 write_flow tests pass; wired to the detail-pane Apply button and the preview Save button
categories.remaining: Save is not yet coupled to Safe Live Save Mode (a scalar save while autoreload is active will still trigger a compositor reload - the historical v0.1.0-era behavior); see Production Save integration

categories.name: Scalar runtime live preview (NEW)
categories.progress: 95% of what this machine can prove
categories.evidence: capability matrix classifies all 341 rows (62 direct + 73 throttled = 135 enabled UI controls, verified in test-generated reports this run); reversible executor with session/throttle/revert; live round trips proven and receipted; two executor defects found and fixed by live proofs (FiniteChoice int quoting, css_gap table grammar)
categories.remaining: 43 rows honestly classified config-write-only and 11 not-proven stay that way by design; nothing further provable here

categories.name: Dead-man preview / recovery UI (NEW)
categories.progress: complete for the provable surface (38/78 armed)
categories.evidence: 78 rows classified (test-generated report); 38 armed strictly via receipts (2 animation + 36 input/cursor, receipts in source); countdown/Keep/Revert/Cancel panel; session-drop and app-close revert registries; timeout auto-revert live-proven
categories.remaining: 18 touch-family rows need touch hardware; left_handed/rotation/resolve_binds_by_sym need secondary-device proofs; 5 model-only; 8 grammar-blocked
categories.hardBlockers: touch/tablet hardware not present on this machine

categories.name: Input/cursor proof receipt system (NEW)
categories.evidence: per-row proof plans for all 63 original rows; env-gated batch harness (fail-closed gates tested); 36 receipts recorded in source with original/preview/fallback; promotion is receipt-gated and test-enforced
categories.remaining: same hardware/secondary-device gaps as dead-man

categories.name: Safe Live Save Mode / autoreload control (NEW)
categories.evidence: module with fixed constant commands and readback-verified transitions; mock tests pass; live round-trip proof receipted; Config-page card with working Enable/Disable buttons (AT-SPI-verified); fails closed on unreadable state
categories.remaining: persisting misc:disable_autoreload=true into the config (so the mode survives restarts) is not implemented; scalar/structured Save flows are not yet gated on the mode

categories.name: Active-config pilot / real-write proof (NEW)
categories.evidence: fifteen-gate pilot module with rehearsal freshness, typed confirmation, live autoreload evidence collection (operator flag alone cannot open the gate - tested); the pilot ran 2026-07-12 via the runtime-first strategy: wrote one inert record to the real hyprland.conf, verified, restored byte-exactly (SHA recorded), no reload fired (runtime-flag marker); recorded in reports and consistent with code
categories.remaining: the pilot proves the mechanism with write+restore; a real user-facing save (write WITHOUT restore) does not exist yet for structured families
categories.confidence: high for the mechanism; the PASS itself is a recorded historical event, re-runnable via the env-gated test

categories.name: Structured-family editors (read/review layer)
categories.evidence: all 7 families parse/render/reread with validators, editor forms, drafts, diff review, staged apply plans, dry-run, rollback reviews - a long fixture-proven chain with passing tests
categories.remaining: the review layer feeds the controlled writer; only persistence UX remains (below)

categories.name: Structured-family controlled writes (temp/copied targets)
categories.evidence: 13 executor tests pass this run: full write/backup/reread/verify/restore/verify round trips for all 7 families against copied temp targets; symlink/path-escape hardening; atomic writes; active config rejected by policy
categories.remaining: none for controlled targets

categories.name: Structured-family runtime preview (NEW)
categories.evidence: all 7 families classified from live probes; hl.animation and hl.curve promoted by zero-residue receipted proofs (modify-existing scope only); supervised UI controls shipped for two fixed records (global speed, default Y0) with live controller proofs; 4 families blocked high-risk, gestures blocked without verification - honest, evidence-based ceilings
categories.remaining: record picker for other explicitly-overridden animation leaves / user-defined curves; the 5 blocked families need recovery systems or hardware that do not exist
categories.hardBlockers: monitor needs a blind display recovery system; bind/device need input fallback models; permission is policy-blocked; gesture needs readback + hardware

categories.name: Structured-family gated persistence (NEW)
categories.evidence: gated_family_save implemented with the pilot's shape minus restore; live flow proof passed for both targets; Save buttons shipped
categories.remaining: record picker breadth

categories.name: Production Save integration (NEW)

addedCategories: Safe Live Save Mode / autoreload control
removedOrDeprecatedCategories: 'Runtime/reload integration' split into: Scalar runtime live preview, Dead-man preview, Input/cursor proofs, Safe Live Save Mode (the old single category hid four distinct tracks)
'Structured-family editors/writes' split into: editors (read/review), controlled writes, runtime preview, gated persistence (one percentage for all four was misleading)
staleClaimsFound: scalar Save is not integrated with Safe Live Save Mode: saving while autoreload is active still reloads the compositor - prior summaries did not surface this as an open integration gap

the 341-row model targets v0.55.2 while the live compositor is 0.55.4; several docs discuss migration readiness but no migration work is possible without trusted upstream data - flagged as the largest structural risk
the older future-capability-era report tail (100+ files) is frozen history, not current state; readers should treat only the test-regenerated reports as live
RESOLVED THIS MARATHON: the Save/safe-mode gap is closed and the 0.55.4 skew was measured at zero drift

blind display recovery system for monitor/display work
trusted official Hyprland 0.55.4 export data for migration

confidenceNotes: Everything marked high-confidence was verified this run by compiling code, running the 1015-test suite, or reading test-regenerated reports. The pilot PASS and live-proof receipts are recorded historical events whose mechanisms remain re-runnable via env-gated tests. Percentages are intentionally absent where they would mislead (capped/deferred/milestone categories).
